---
name: Feature Request & Feedback
about: Suggest a new mechanic, plant type, UI change, or general game balance feedback.
title: '[Feedback]: '
labels: enhancement, feedback
---

### Type of Feedback (Pick One)
- [ ] New Gameplay Feature / Mechanic
- [ ] UI / UX Improvement (Menus, text layout, layout design)
- [ ] Balance / Gameplay Loop Tweak (Timings, progressions)
- [ ] New Plant / Aesthetic Concept
- [ ] Other

### Your Suggestion / Idea
A clear and concise description of what you want to see changed or added to Git Bloom.

### The Current Experience
How does this part of the game work right now, and why do you feel it could be improved or expanded?

### How This Improves the Gameplay Loop
Explain how this change makes Git Bloom more engaging, more relaxing, or easier to understand for players.

### Reference Material (Optional)
If you have mockups, sketches, or screenshots of UI styles from other games that inspire your idea, drag and drop them here.
